name: Ring Spinner
description: Classic rotating ring spinner — universally understood.

name: Bouncing Dots
description: Three dots bounce in sequence — smooth loading indicator.

name: Progress Bar
description: Animated infinite progress bar — great for page loads.

name: Pulse Ring
description: Expanding pulse rings — like a radar or heartbeat.

name: Orbit Ring
description: Small dot orbits a center circle — elegant and unique.

name: Skeleton Loader
description: Content skeleton with shimmer — placeholder for async content.

name: Equalizer Bars
description: Equalizer-style animated bars — great for audio/voice states.

name: Ripple Loader
description: Two concentric ripple rings expand outward alternately.

name: Gradient Ring
description: Conic gradient spinner with vivid color arc.

name: Shimmer Card
description: Full card placeholder shimmer for article/image lists.

name: Typing Indicator
description: Chat typing indicator — three sequential jumping dots.

name: Dual Ring
description: Two counter-rotating rings for a layered spinner effect.

name: Loading Text
description: Animated "Loading..." text with fading trailing dots.

name: Circular Progress
description: SVG circular progress indicator with animated stroke.
html:
<svg class="circular-progress" viewBox="0 0 44 44">
  <circle class="bg-circle" cx="22" cy="22" r="18" />
  <circle class="progress-circle" cx="22" cy="22" r="18" />
</svg>

name: WiFi Loader
description: Animated WiFi icon — arcs appear in sequence.
